description_long: This is a two-story bungalow with a dark gray exterior and a light gray gabled roof, surrounded by a low white fence and lush green hedges. The front facade features symmetrical windows and a central entrance, flanked by manicured bushes and a paved walkway. The side view reveals a private backyard with a small pool, green lawn, and additional landscaping, as well as a driveway leading to a garage. The rear of the bungalow includes a patio area, large windows, and a staircase descending to the garden. The property is bordered by a combination of hedges and fencing, providing privacy and a defined perimeter. The overall design is modern with clean lines, ample windows, and a well-maintained garden.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a dark gray facade, light gray gabled roof, symmetrical windows, and landscaped gardens enclosed by white fencing and hedges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, manicured bushes, and a central walkway framed by hedges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, backyard garden, and the white perimeter fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio, large windows, backyard pool, and a staircase leading to the garden.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the pool, patio, garden, and the transition between the backyard and side yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
